sites.name: ELITTE SOFA
sites.satellite_signature: Coloured water plumes visible in RGB satellite imagery (blue, brown, red tones depending on dye batch). Downstream foam accumulation in river eddies. Seasonal signal — stronger discharge during wet-processing runs. Reduced NDVI in riparian vegetation near outfall.

sites.name: Tudnik za travertin
sites.satellite_signature: No specific spectral signature. Monitor for turbidity changes and riparian NDVI decline in multitemporal analysis.

sites.name: Rudnik za travertin
sites.satellite_signature: Orange/yellow AMD staining on riverbed. High turbidity plume detectable in Sentinel-2 B2 (blue) band. Tailings pond visible as grey polygons with sharp boundaries on Google Earth.
